top_signals.title: Pro-crypto Menefee unseats Al Green in Texas Democratic primary runoff, supported by Fairshake
top_signals.summary: This follows millions of dollars in crypto super PAC spending that backed Menefee and opposed Green, a vocal critic of crypto.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Moneybox profit slides as wealth manager bets on ‘high levels of automation’
top_signals.summary: Moneybox saw its profit slide by nearly a quarter in the last year as the wealth manager invested “heavily” in new technology and bet on “high levels of automation”. The London-based fintech notched its third consecutive year of profitability but faced a 23 per cent drop in its pre-tax takings at £14.9m by the end [...]
